modules.title: Module 1
modules.description: Basic questions about your invisible friend: name, age, appearance, and clothes.

items.question_pl: Jak ma na imię twój przyjaciel?
items.question_en: What is your friend's name?
items.answer_pl: Mój przyjaciel ma na imię Kuba.

items.question_en: How old is your friend?
items.answer_en: My friend is thirteen years old.

items.question_en: When is your friend's birthday?
items.answer_pl: Mój przyjaciel ma urodziny w maju.
items.answer_en: My friend has a birthday in May.

items.question_en: Where is your friend from?

items.question_pl: Jaki kolor mają włosy twojego przyjaciela?
items.question_en: What colour is your friend's hair?
What eyes does your friend have?

items.question_pl: Czy twój przyjaciel ma długie włosy?
items.question_en: Does your friend have long hair?
Does your friend wear glasses?
Is your friend tall?
Is your friend short?
Is your friend slim?
What does your friend's face look like?
items.answer_pl: On ma okrągłą twarz i miły uśmiech.
items.answer_en: He has a round face and a nice smile.

items.question_en: What does your friend usually wear?
items.answer_pl: On zwykle nosi dżinsy i bluzę.
items.answer_en: He usually wears jeans and a hoodie.

items.question_pl: Jaki jest ulubiony kolor ubrań twojego przyjaciela?
items.question_en: What is your friend's favourite clothing colour?
Does your friend wear a hat?
items.answer_en: Yes, sometimes he wears a black hat.

items.question_en: What shoes does your friend wear?

modules.title: Module 2
modules.description: Questions about personality, hobbies, sport, and favourite things.

items.question_en: What is your friend like?
Is your friend funny?
Is your friend shy?
items.answer_pl: Nie, on jest raczej pewny siebie.

items.question_en: Is your friend hard-working?

items.question_pl: Co lubi robić twój przyjaciel po szkole?
items.question_en: What does your friend like doing after school?
items.answer_pl: Po szkole on lubi grać w piłkę nożną.
items.answer_en: After school he likes playing football.

items.question_en: Does your friend like music?
items.answer_en: Yes, he likes music very much.

items.question_en: What music does your friend listen to?
Does your friend like reading?
What sport does your friend do?
Is your friend active?

items.question_pl: Co robi twój przyjaciel w weekend?
items.question_en: What does your friend do at the weekend?
items.answer_pl: W weekend on jeździ na rowerze.
items.answer_en: At the weekend he rides his bike.

items.question_en: Does your friend like swimming?
items.answer_en: Yes, in summer he likes swimming.

items.question_pl: Jakie jest ulubione jedzenie twojego przyjaciela?
items.question_en: What is your friend's favourite food?

items.question_pl: Jaki jest ulubiony napój twojego przyjaciela?
items.question_en: What is your friend's favourite drink?
items.answer_pl: Jego ulubiony napój to sok jabłkowy.
items.answer_en: His favourite drink is apple juice.

items.question_pl: Jaki jest ulubiony przedmiot twojego przyjaciela?
items.question_en: What is your friend's favourite school subject?

items.question_pl: Jaki jest ulubiony kolor twojego przyjaciela?
items.question_en: What is your friend's favourite colour?

modules.title: Module 3
modules.description: Short answers about family, home, school, and daily routine.

items.question_en: Does your friend have siblings?
Who does your friend live with?
items.answer_pl: On mieszka z mamą, tatą i siostrą.
items.answer_en: He lives with his mum, dad and sister.

items.question_en: Does your friend have a pet?
items.answer_en: Yes, he has a small dog.

items.question_pl: Czy twój przyjaciel lubi swoją rodzinę?
items.question_en: Does your friend like his family?
items.answer_pl: Tak, on bardzo lubi swoją rodzinę.
items.answer_en: Yes, he likes his family very much.

items.question_en: Where does your friend live?

items.question_pl: Czy twój przyjaciel mieszka w domu czy w mieszkaniu?
items.question_en: Does your friend live in a house or a flat?
What is his room like?
items.answer_pl: Jego pokój jest jasny i nowoczesny.
items.answer_en: His room is bright and modern.

items.question_pl: Czy w jego pokoju jest biurko?
items.question_en: Is there a desk in his room?
items.answer_pl: Tak, w jego pokoju jest duże biurko.
items.answer_en: Yes, there is a big desk in his room.

items.question_pl: Do jakiej szkoły chodzi twój przyjaciel?
items.question_en: What school does your friend go to?
items.answer_pl: Mój przyjaciel chodzi do szkoły średniej.
items.answer_en: My friend goes to secondary school.

items.question_en: Does your friend like school?

items.question_pl: Jakiego przedmiotu nie lubi twój przyjaciel?
items.question_en: What subject does your friend not like?

items.question_pl: Czy twój przyjaciel odrabia pracę domową?
items.question_en: Does your friend do homework?
items.answer_pl: Tak, on zawsze odrabia pracę domową.
items.answer_en: Yes, he always does his homework.

items.question_pl: O której godzinie twój przyjaciel wstaje?
items.question_en: What time does your friend get up?
items.answer_en: He gets up at seven o'clock.

items.question_pl: Co je twój przyjaciel na śniadanie?
items.question_en: What does your friend eat for breakfast?
items.answer_pl: Na śniadanie on je płatki z mlekiem.
items.answer_en: For breakfast he eats cereal with milk.

items.question_pl: Jak twój przyjaciel idzie do szkoły?
items.question_en: How does your friend go to school?
items.answer_en: He goes to school on foot.

items.question_en: What does your friend do in the evening?
items.answer_pl: Wieczorem on ogląda telewizję i czyta książkę.
items.answer_en: In the evening he watches television and reads a book.
